name: Surflexers
short_description: Surflexers is a fast-paced VR game with puzzle elements where you have to make quick decisions and move along "lines" to advance in the game
detailed_description:
Surflexers is a fast-paced VR game with puzzle elements where you have to make quick decisions and move along "lines" to advance in the game. Be careful some "lines" are lead to a dead end.

Key Features:

Avoid white cross boxes
Do not fall
Collect coins
Ride along lines!
Be quick!
about_the_game:
Surflexers is a fast-paced VR game with puzzle elements where you have to make quick decisions and move along "lines" to advance in the game. Be careful some "lines" are lead to a dead end.

Key Features:

Do not fall
Collect coins
Ride along lines!
Be quick!
